question: Will Anthropic's next ARR figure show an accelerating % growth rate?
textDescription:
Resolution Criteria

Resolves based off of epoch data. 

Resolves YES if Anthropic's Compounded Monthly Growth Rate (CMGR) between Apr 6 and the next data point is greater than the baseline:

The Baseline (Jan 1, 2026 – April 6, 2026):

Start ARR: $9 Billion (Dec. 31, 2025)

End ARR: $30 Billion (April 6, 2026)

Duration: 3.17 months (96 days)

Baseline CMGR: 45.9% per month > Formula: [(30/9)(1/3.17)−1]×100

Resolves NO otherwise.
newsShortReason: Anthropic's annualized revenue surged from $9B to $30B between December 2025 and April 2026, indicating accelerating growth.
newsKeyEvidence: Anthropic's annualized revenue increased from $9 billion at the end of 2025 to over $30 billion in April 2026. ([sacra.com](https://sacra.com/research/anthropic/?utm_source=openai)) | The number of business customers spending over $1 million annually with Anthropic doubled to more than 1,000 since February 2026. ([venturebeat.com](https://venturebeat.com/technology/anthropic-says-it-hit-a-30-billion-revenue-run-rate-after-crazy-80x-growth?utm_source=openai)) | The company announced an expanded partnership with Google and Broadcom for multiple gigawatts of next-generation TPU capacity beginning in 2027. ([siliconangle.com](https://siliconangle.com/2026/04/06/anthropic-taps-google-broadcom-yet-ai-chips-revenue-run-rate-tops-30b/?utm_source=openai))
